title: 28 lakh candidates for 32,679 vacancies: Oppn. attacks U.P. govt. over ‘mounting unemployment’
content:
A staggering 28 lakh candidates are competing for only 32,679 government job vacancies.
*   The Opposition has attacked the Uttar Pradesh government, blaming the situation on "mounting unemployment."
*   The severe disparity between applicants and available jobs highlights a significant unemployment challenge in the state.

title: RBI moves Madras High Court against order to transfer Swami Satyananda’s money to Italy
content:
The Reserve Bank of India (RBI) has approached the Madras High Court.
*   The RBI is challenging a previous order concerning the transfer of money belonging to Swami Satyananda.
*   The disputed funds are slated to be transferred to Italy.
